title: GeneratedTraceability v0
description: Lineage triple emitted alongside generated Java by the BFF GeneratedView. Governed by ADR 0006 (Studio-BFF Contract Versioning). schemaVersion is optional on the wire; absence means v0. When lineage is unavailable, the whole DTO is omitted so Studio renders the ADR 0006 Decision 4 "Lineage unavailable" fallback.

schemaVersion.description: DTO version per ADR 0006. Optional on the wire; absence means v0. Bumped only for non-additive changes.
